title: EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an advocacy program that helps students and their families set and achieve goals in four key areas: Mind, Body, Spirit, and Context. Services include wrap-around services, advocacy services, college visits, life skills workshops, job training, financial aid assistance, school tutoring, after-school homework help, and the development of cultural pride and relevant skills. Incentives like stipends, meals, clothing, hygiene items, school supplies, and financial assistance for youth participants. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: -Portland Public School District: K-12th grade self-identified Native American youth -Successful Families 2020: K-12th grade self-identified Native American youth enrolled in select schools within David Douglas and Reynolds school districts. -SUN Youth Advocacy: 5th-10th grade self-identified Native American youth enrolled in select schools within Centennial, David Douglas, Gresham-Barlow, Parkrose, Portland Public, and Reynolds school districts. OR Region 3: 5th-10th grade any race/ethnicity enrolled in the following schools: Alice Ott Middle, Cherry Park Elementary, Gilbert Heights Elementary, Gilbert Park Elementary, Parkrose High, Parkrose Middle, Prescott Elementary, Sacramento Elementary, and Shaver Elementary Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, some evening hours for events Email (503) 288-8177 329 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 288-8177 Main phone Youth Advocacy Manager (503) 288-8177 ext 329 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs * Native American Community Prejob Guidance * Native American Community Student Financial Aid * Native American Community Tutoring Services * Native American Community Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Native American Community Youth Enrichment Programs * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE -
